requirement_topic.en: PV Module Fire Classification — UL 61730 / UL 790 / ASTM E108
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏组件防火等级——UL 61730 / UL 790 / ASTM E108
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏組件防火等級——UL 61730 / UL 790 / ASTM E108

summary.en: UL 61730 (the US harmonisation of IEC 61730) requires PV modules to carry a fire classification rating — Class A, B, or C — based on the spread-of-flame and burning-brand tests defined in UL 790 (equivalent to ASTM E108). Class A provides the highest resistance to severe fire exposure. Most US jurisdictions and the National Electrical Code (NEC Article 690) require at minimum Class C; many AHJs (Authorities Having Jurisdiction) and utility interconnection agreements mandate Class A, particularly for rooftop installations. Perovskite modules must obtain a UL 61730 listing that explicitly carries a declared fire class before they can be legally sold or installed in the US.
summary.zh: UL 61730（IEC 61730的美国协调版本）要求光伏组件依据UL 790（等同ASTM E108）中规定的火焰蔓延及燃烧品牌测试，取得A、B或C级防火等级。A级对严重火灾暴露具有最高抵抗力。大多数美国司法管辖区及《国家电气法规》（NEC第690条）至少要求C级；许多地方权力机构（AHJ）及公用事业互联协议——尤其是屋顶安装场景——强制要求A级。钙钛矿组件须取得明确载明防火等级的UL 61730认证，方可在美国合法销售或安装。
summary.zht: UL 61730（IEC 61730的美國協調版本）要求光伏組件依據UL 790（等同ASTM E108）中規定的火焰蔓延及燃燒品牌測試，取得A、B或C級防火等級。A級對嚴重火災暴露具有最高抵抗力。大多數美國司法管轄區及《國家電氣法規》（NEC第690條）至少要求C級；許多地方權力機構（AHJ）及公用事業互聯協議——尤其是屋頂安裝場景——強制要求A級。鈣鈦礦組件須取得明確載明防火等級的UL 61730認證，方可在美國合法銷售或安裝。

standards_or_laws: UL 790 (Standard for Tests for Fire Resistance of Roof Covering Materials)
ASTM E108 (Standard Test Methods for Fire Tests of Roof Coverings)

summary.en: China certifies PV modules under GB/T 9978 series (fire resistance of building components) and GB 4943.1 for general product safety, but there is no direct Chinese national standard that mandates a declared fire classification (Class A/B/C) for PV modules equivalent to the UL 790/ASTM E108 test regime. The Chinese CQC voluntary certification and NB/T 32004 (inverter safety) do not address module-level fire spread. Fire-related module requirements in China are mostly addressed through building fire codes (GB 50016) at the installation level rather than as a product-level listing requirement.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB/T 9978系列（建筑构件耐火性能）及GB 4943.1（一般产品安全）对光伏组件进行认证，但目前没有直接对应UL 790/ASTM E108测试体系、要求光伏组件明确取得A/B/C防火等级的中国国家标准。中国CQC自愿认证及NB/T 32004（逆变器安全）均未涵盖组件层面的火焰蔓延要求。中国与组件相关的防火要求主要通过安装层面的建筑防火规范（GB 50016）实现，而非产品层面的强制认证要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB/T 9978系列（建築構件耐火性能）及GB 4943.1（一般產品安全）對光伏組件進行認證，但目前沒有直接對應UL 790/ASTM E108測試體系、要求光伏組件明確取得A/B/C防火等級的中國國家標準。中國CQC自願認證及NB/T 32004（逆變器安全）均未涵蓋組件層面的火焰蔓延要求。中國與組件相關的防火要求主要通過安裝層面的建築防火規範（GB 50016）實現，而非產品層面的強制認證要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9978 series (Fire Resistance Tests — Building Components)
GB 50016 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings)
NB/T 32004 (Technical Requirements for PV Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: China has no product-level fire-class listing requirement for PV modules comparable to UL 61730 + UL 790/ASTM E108. Chinese-manufactured perovskite modules will not carry a declared US fire class and cannot be installed in the US without completing UL 61730 qualification with an explicit Class A, B, or C rating. This is a full compliance gap requiring new third-party testing and listing by a US-recognised NRTL.
gap.zh: 中国没有对应UL 61730 + UL 790/ASTM E108的光伏组件产品级防火等级认证要求。中国制造的钙钛矿组件将不具备美国防火等级声明，未完成UL 61730认证（明确取得A、B或C级）前无法在美国安装。这是一个需要通过美国认可的NRTL进行全新第三方测试与认证的完整合规差距。
gap.zht: 中國沒有對應UL 61730 + UL 790/ASTM E108的光伏組件產品級防火等級認證要求。中國製造的鈣鈦礦組件將不具備美國防火等級聲明，未完成UL 61730認證（明確取得A、B或C級）前無法在美國安裝。這是一個需要通過美國認可的NRTL進行全新第三方測試與認證的完整合規差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required for market access in most US jurisdictions under NEC Article 690 and AHJ requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent mandatory module-level fire class listing in China

source.publisher: UL Solutions (IEC/UL 61730 harmonized standard resource page)

compliance_verdict.en: NON-COMPLIANT by default. A perovskite module manufactured in China and certified only under Chinese standards will not carry a UL 61730 fire classification. It cannot legally be sold or installed in the US until UL 61730 listing with a declared fire class (A, B, or C) is obtained from a US-recognised NRTL. This is an informational assessment only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 默认不合规。仅按中国标准认证的中国制造钙钛矿组件不具备UL 61730防火等级。在从美国认可的NRTL取得含明确防火等级（A、B或C级）的UL 61730认证前，该组件在美国不能合法销售或安装。以上为信息性评估，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 預設不合規。僅按中國標準認證的中國製造鈣鈦礦組件不具備UL 61730防火等級。在從美國認可的NRTL取得含明確防火等級（A、B或C級）的UL 61730認證前，該組件在美國不能合法銷售或安裝。以上為資訊性評估，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: Lead (Pb) Hazardous Waste — EPA TCLP / RCRA Subtitle C (Perovskite-Specific End-of-Life Risk) [No EPA perovskite-specific rule as of June 2026 — formulation TCLP testing required]
requirement_topic.zh: 铅（Pb）危险废物——EPA TCLP / RCRA附则C（钙钛矿特定的报废风险）[截至2026年6月EPA尚无钙钛矿专项规则——须对配方进行TCLP测试]
requirement_topic.zht: 鉛（Pb）危險廢物——EPA TCLP / RCRA附則C（鈣鈦礦特定的報廢風險）[截至2026年6月EPA尚無鈣鈦礦專項規則——須對配方進行TCLP測試]

summary.en: Lead-halide perovskite PV modules contain lead compounds (typically CH3NH3PbI3 or similar). Under US federal law, end-of-life disposal is governed by the Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) Subtitle C. The EPA Toxicity Characteristic Leaching Procedure (TCLP, Method 1311) is used to determine whether a solid waste exhibits the toxicity characteristic for lead: if leachate exceeds 5 mg/L Pb, the waste is classified as hazardous waste code D008 and must be managed under RCRA Subtitle C (40 CFR Part 261.24). Multiple peer-reviewed studies confirm that lead-perovskite module fragments can exceed the TCLP D008 lead threshold under water-extraction conditions, making hazardous-waste classification a credible end-of-life risk. California manages discarded PV modules under universal-waste rules (Title 22 CCR, administered by DTSC); other US states have varying solar stewardship or e-waste requirements. EPA has not issued a perovskite-specific module disposal rule as of June 2026 — the TCLP determination must be conducted on the specific module formulation before US market entry. State-by-state obligations must be verified per jurisdiction.
summary.zh: 铅卤化物钙钛矿光伏组件含有铅化合物（通常为CH3NH3PbI3或类似物）。根据美国联邦法律，报废处置受《资源保护与回收法》（RCRA）附则C管辖。EPA毒性特征浸出程序（TCLP，方法1311）用于判断固体废物是否具有铅的毒性特征：若浸出液铅含量超过5 mg/L，该废物将被认定为危险废物代码D008，须按RCRA附则C进行管理（40 CFR第261.24条）。多项同行评审研究已证实，铅钙钛矿组件碎片在水萃取条件下可超过TCLP D008铅阈值，使危险废物分类成为可信的报废风险。加利福尼亚州依据通用废物规则（Title 22 CCR，由DTSC执行）管理废弃光伏组件；美国其他州的太阳能板管理或电子废物要求各异。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未发布针对钙钛矿组件的专项处置规则——TCLP判定须在进入美国市场前针对特定组件配方进行。各州具体义务须逐州核实。
summary.zht: 鉛鹵化物鈣鈦礦光伏組件含有鉛化合物（通常為CH3NH3PbI3或類似物）。根據美國聯邦法律，報廢處置受《資源保護與回收法》（RCRA）附則C管轄。EPA毒性特徵浸出程序（TCLP，方法1311）用於判斷固體廢物是否具有鉛的毒性特徵：若浸出液鉛含量超過5 mg/L，該廢物將被認定為危險廢物代碼D008，須按RCRA附則C進行管理（40 CFR第261.24條）。多項同行評審研究已證實，鉛鈣鈦礦組件碎片在水萃取條件下可超過TCLP D008鉛閾值，使危險廢物分類成為可信的報廢風險。加利福尼亞州依據通用廢物規則（Title 22 CCR，由DTSC執行）管理廢棄光伏組件；美國其他州的太陽能板管理或電子廢物要求各異。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未發布針對鈣鈦礦組件的專項處置規則——TCLP判定須在進入美國市場前針對特定組件配方進行。各州具體義務須逐州核實。

standards_or_laws: RCRA Subtitle C (42 U.S.C. 6921 et seq.) — Hazardous Waste Management
EPA TCLP Method 1311 (Toxicity Characteristic Leaching Procedure) — 40 CFR Part 261, Appendix II
40 CFR Part 261.24 — Toxicity Characteristic (D008 Lead threshold: 5.0 mg/L)
California universal-waste rules for PV modules — Title 22 CCR, administered by DTSC

State-level solar stewardship and e-waste rules — vary by jurisdiction; California (Title 22 CCR universal-waste rules, DTSC) confirmed applicable to PV modules; confirm requirements in each target state before US market entry

summary.en: China does not have an equivalent end-of-life leaching test for PV modules that mirrors the US EPA TCLP D008 hazardous-waste determination. GB/T 15555.2 governs solid-waste leaching tests in China, and GB 5085.3 sets hazardous-waste identification standards for leaching toxicity, but these are not specifically applied to PV module disposal as a standard industry practice. The Chinese national standard GB/T 39560 series (PV module recycling) addresses collection and processing but does not impose a TCLP-equivalent lead-leaching threshold that would trigger hazardous-waste classification for lead-containing perovskite modules. No binding Chinese regulation specifically classifies lead-halide perovskite modules as hazardous waste at end of life.
summary.zh: 中国没有对应美国EPA TCLP D008危险废物判定的光伏组件报废浸出测试要求。GB/T 15555.2规范中国固体废物浸出测试，GB 5085.3设定浸出毒性危险废物鉴别标准，但两者均未作为行业惯例专门适用于光伏组件的报废处置。中国国家标准GB/T 39560系列（光伏组件回收利用）涵盖收集与处理，但未规定会触发含铅钙钛矿组件危险废物分类的等效TCLP铅浸出阈值。目前没有中国约束性法规专门将铅卤化物钙钛矿组件在报废时认定为危险废物。
summary.zht: 中國沒有對應美國EPA TCLP D008危險廢物判定的光伏組件報廢浸出測試要求。GB/T 15555.2規範中國固體廢物浸出測試，GB 5085.3設定浸出毒性危險廢物鑑別標準，但兩者均未作為行業慣例專門適用於光伏組件的報廢處置。中國國家標準GB/T 39560系列（光伏組件回收利用）涵蓋收集與處理，但未規定會觸發含鉛鈣鈦礦組件危險廢物分類的等效TCLP鉛浸出閾值。目前沒有中國約束性法規專門將鉛鹵化物鈣鈦礦組件在報廢時認定為危險廢物。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 15555.2 (Identification of Solid Waste — Leaching Toxicity)
GB 5085.3 (Identification Standards for Hazardous Wastes — Leaching Toxicity)
GB/T 39560 series (General Specifications for PV Module Recycling)

gap.en: The US EPA TCLP D008 threshold (5 mg/L Pb) is confirmed (40 CFR 261.24) and creates a real hazardous-waste classification risk at end of life for lead-halide perovskite modules; peer-reviewed studies confirm exceedance is likely for many formulations. This risk has no equivalent in Chinese regulation. If a specific module formulation fails TCLP, US disposal costs and liabilities increase substantially under RCRA Subtitle C. Chinese manufacturers have no domestic regulatory equivalent that would prompt pre-market TCLP testing. State-level obligations compound the federal risk: California manages discarded PV modules under universal-waste rules (Title 22 CCR, DTSC); other states have varying solar stewardship or e-waste requirements. EPA has not issued a perovskite-specific disposal determination as of June 2026 — manufacturers should conduct TCLP testing on their specific formulation and consult environmental counsel on applicable state obligations before US market entry.
gap.zh: 美国EPA TCLP D008阈值（铅5 mg/L）已获确认（40 CFR 261.24），为铅卤化物钙钛矿组件在报废时带来真实的危险废物分类风险；同行评审研究证实多数配方很可能超标。该风险在中国法规中没有对应要求。若特定组件配方未能通过TCLP，RCRA附则C下的美国处置成本及法律责任将大幅增加。中国制造商在国内没有类似监管要求促使其在上市前进行TCLP测试。州级义务加剧了联邦层面的风险：加利福尼亚州依据通用废物规则（Title 22 CCR，DTSC执行）管理废弃光伏组件；其他州的太阳能板管理或电子废物要求各异。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未就钙钛矿组件出具专项处置认定——制造商应在进入美国市场前对其特定配方进行TCLP测试，并就各州适用义务咨询环境法律顾问。
gap.zht: 美國EPA TCLP D008閾值（鉛5 mg/L）已獲確認（40 CFR 261.24），為鉛鹵化物鈣鈦礦組件在報廢時帶來真實的危險廢物分類風險；同行評審研究證實多數配方很可能超標。該風險在中國法規中沒有對應要求。若特定組件配方未能通過TCLP，RCRA附則C下的美國處置成本及法律責任將大幅增加。中國製造商在國內沒有類似監管要求促使其在上市前進行TCLP測試。州級義務加劇了聯邦層面的風險：加利福尼亞州依據通用廢物規則（Title 22 CCR，DTSC執行）管理廢棄光伏組件；其他州的太陽能板管理或電子廢物要求各異。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未就鈣鈦礦組件出具專項處置認定——製造商應在進入美國市場前對其特定配方進行TCLP測試，並就各州適用義務諮詢環境法律顧問。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if triggered — RCRA Subtitle C hazardous-waste rules apply automatically if a module waste stream tests above the TCLP D008 lead threshold (5 mg/L); no separate product approval is required pre-market, but downstream disposal obligations are legally binding
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent TCLP-based hazardous-waste determination for PV modules in Chinese regulation

compliance_verdict.en: RISK FLAGGED. Lead-halide perovskite modules sold in the US are subject to RCRA Subtitle C hazardous-waste obligations at end of life if the specific formulation exceeds the EPA TCLP lead threshold of 5 mg/L (D008, 40 CFR 261.24). Peer-reviewed literature confirms this threshold is commonly exceeded by lead-perovskite fragments. EPA has not issued a perovskite-specific disposal determination as of June 2026. Manufacturers and importers should commission TCLP testing on their specific module formulation before US market entry to assess disposal classification. State-level solar stewardship and universal-waste programmes (California manages discarded PV modules under Title 22 CCR universal-waste rules; other states vary) add additional compliance obligations that must be verified per jurisdiction. This is an informational assessment only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 风险提示。在美国销售的铅卤化物钙钛矿组件，若其特定配方超过EPA TCLP铅阈值5 mg/L（D008，40 CFR 261.24），在报废时须承担RCRA附则C危险废物义务。同行评审文献证实铅钙钛矿碎片通常超过该阈值。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未就钙钛矿组件出具专项处置认定。制造商及进口商应在进入美国市场前，对其特定组件配方委托进行TCLP测试，以评估处置分类。州级太阳能板管理及通用废物计划（加利福尼亚州依据Title 22 CCR通用废物规则管理废弃光伏组件；其他州规定各异）带来额外合规义务，须逐州核实。以上为信息性评估，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 風險提示。在美國銷售的鉛鹵化物鈣鈦礦組件，若其特定配方超過EPA TCLP鉛閾值5 mg/L（D008，40 CFR 261.24），在報廢時須承擔RCRA附則C危險廢物義務。同行評審文獻證實鉛鈣鈦礦碎片通常超過該閾值。截至2026年6月，EPA尚未就鈣鈦礦組件出具專項處置認定。製造商及進口商應在進入美國市場前，對其特定組件配方委託進行TCLP測試，以評估處置分類。州級太陽能板管理及通用廢物計劃（加利福尼亞州依據Title 22 CCR通用廢物規則管理廢棄光伏組件；其他州規定各異）帶來額外合規義務，須逐州核實。以上為資訊性評估，不構成法律或監管建議。
